maps.title: MAP: Ensure branches provide facility for
maps.objective: To ensure ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Ensure branches provide facility for
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Ensure branches provide facility for'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description: (b) Banks shall ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Ensure branches provide facility for
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all their branches provide facility for exchange of notes and coins not only to their customers but also others. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Ensure branches provide facility for
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Ensure branches provide facility for'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Ensure branches provide facility fo
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Ensure branches provide facility for' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Ensure branches provide facili
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Ensure branches provide facility for'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
